'''âp-h-l''' ('''kapahal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythmake|mythmake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythmake|mythmake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| kapahal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipahal|thipahal]] || [[word:jipahal|jipahal]] || [[word:shipahal|shipahal]] || [[word:kipahal|kipahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupahal|thuthupahal]] || [[word:jujupahal|jujupahal]] || [[word:shushupahal|shushupahal]] || [[word:kukupahal|kukupahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupahal|thupahal]] || [[word:jupahal|jupahal]] || [[word:shupahal|shupahal]] || [[word:kupahal|kupahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupahal|thupahal]] || [[word:jupahal|jupahal]] || [[word:shupahal|shupahal]] || [[word:kupahal|kupahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepahal|thepahal]] || [[word:jepahal|jepahal]] || [[word:shepahal|shepahal]] || [[word:kepahal|kepahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopahal|thothopahal]] || [[word:jojopahal|jojopahal]] || [[word:shoshopahal|shoshopahal]] || [[word:kokopahal|kokopahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopahal|thopahal]] || [[word:jopahal|jopahal]] || [[word:shopahal|shopahal]] || [[word:kopahal|kopahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopahal|thopahal]] || [[word:jopahal|jopahal]] || [[word:shopahal|shopahal]] || [[word:kopahal|kopahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpahal|thĂŠpahal]] || [[word:jĂŠpahal|jĂŠpahal]] || [[word:shĂŠpahal|shĂŠpahal]] || [[word:kĂŠpahal|kĂŠpahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapahal|thathapahal]] || [[word:jajapahal|jajapahal]] || [[word:shashapahal|shashapahal]] || [[word:kakapahal|kakapahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapahal|thapahal]] || [[word:japahal|japahal]] || [[word:shapahal|shapahal]] || [[word:kapahal|kapahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapahal|thapahal]] || [[word:japahal|japahal]] || [[word:shapahal|shapahal]] || [[word:kapahal|kapahal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapahal|shapahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapahal|goshapahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapahal|gokishapahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapahalnĂŒ|shapahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapahalnknĂŒ|goshapahalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahalnĂŒ|gokishapahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapahalshĂ«|shapahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapahalnkshĂ«|goshapahalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapahalshĂ«|gokishapahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahalro|shapahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahalnkro|goshapahalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahalro|gokishapahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahalmu|shapahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahalnkmu|goshapahalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahalmu|gokishapahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapahalsher|shapahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapahalnksher|goshapahalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapahalsher|gokishapahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapahalng|shapahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapahalnkng|goshapahalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapahalng|gokishapahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapahalya|shapahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapahalnkya|goshapahalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapahalya|gokishapahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapahalyam|shapahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapahalnkyam|goshapahalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapahalyam|gokishapahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahalnĂŒshĂ«|shapahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapahalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahalnĂŒro|shapahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahalnknĂŒro|goshapahalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahalnĂŒro|gokishapahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahalnĂŒmu|shapahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahalnknĂŒmu|goshapahalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahalnĂŒmu|gokishapahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahalshĂ«nĂŒ|shapahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahalshĂ«ro|shapahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahalnkshĂ«ro|goshapahalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahalshĂ«ro|gokishapahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahalshĂ«mu|shapahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahalnkshĂ«mu|goshapahalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahalshĂ«mu|gokishapahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahalronĂŒ|shapahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahalnkronĂŒ|goshapahalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahalronĂŒ|gokishapahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahalroshĂ«|shapahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahalnkroshĂ«|goshapahalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahalroshĂ«|gokishapahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahalromu|shapahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahalnkromu|goshapahalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahalromu|gokishapahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahalmunĂŒ|shapahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahalnkmunĂŒ|goshapahalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahalmunĂŒ|gokishapahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahalmushĂ«|shapahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahalnkmushĂ«|goshapahalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahalmushĂ«|gokishapahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahalmuro|shapahalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahalnkmuro|goshapahalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahalmuro|gokishapahalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
